case_title: AMY BAXTER JONES VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $953.37 FILED BY JONES, AMY BAXTER AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CORRESPONDENCE RE: CALTRANS REQUESTS VENUE IN THIS MATTER REMAIN IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND THAT THE CHALLENGE TO VENUE PREVIOUSLY FILED ON B SEPT-01-2015 BE DISREGARDED. FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY JONES, AMY BAXTER CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HUY KIN NGAY--CLAIMS OFFICER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, AMY BAXTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
